diagrams.title: Process Structure for Critical Section
diagrams.description: General structure of a process showing entry section, critical section, exit section, and remainder section
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the organization of code for critical section problem solutions

diagrams.title: Peterson's Algorithm Flowchart
diagrams.description: Two-process Peterson's algorithm showing how flag and turn variables coordinate entry to critical section
elements: Entry: set flag TRUE, set turn to other
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing software-based mutual exclusion solution for two processes

diagrams.title: Semaphore Operations Flow
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing wait() and signal() operations on a semaphore
elements: wait() - decrement value, if negative block process
signal() - increment value, if non-positive wake waiting process
diagrams.purpose: Understanding atomic semaphore operations for process synchronization

diagrams.title: Monitor Structure
diagrams.description: High-level view of a monitor with condition variables and mutual exclusion
diagrams.purpose: Understanding high-level synchronization construct for critical sections
